# TechDoc
> Technical documents curated by Dennis Kim (@gameworkerkim). Covers serverless platforms, cloud cost optimization, AI/LLM, coding assistants, and developer infrastructure.

## Serverless & SaaS Free Tier

### CloudFlare
- [Cloudflare Free Tier Guide](CloudFlare/Cloudflare%20free%20tier%20guide.md) | Comprehensive guide to Cloudflare's free tier: Workers, Pages, D1, R2, KV, security services.

### OracleCloud
- [Oracle Cloud Free Tier Guide](OracleCloud/02.%20Oracle%20Cloud%20Free%20Tier%20Guide.md) | Korean guide to Oracle Always Free Tier: ARM VMs, databases, networking.

### Neon
- [Neon Review](Neon/Neon_review.md) | Evaluation of Neon.tech serverless PostgreSQL: branching, pricing, free tier limits.

### SQLite / Turso
- [Turso Guide](SQLite_%20Turso/Turso_guide.md) | Distributed SQLite at the edge: setup, replication, free tier.

### Serverless Redis
- [Upstash Guide](Serverless_Redis/upstash_guide.md) | Serverless Redis/Kafka evaluation: per-request pricing, free tier comparison.

### Vercel
- [Vercel Analysis](vercel/vercel_analysis.md) | Platform analysis: pricing tiers, edge functions, limits, cost-effectiveness.

### GitHub CDN
- [Global Free CDN Guide](github_cdn/Global%20free%20cdn%20guide.md) | Free global CDN options: jsDelivr, GitHub CDN, alternatives.
- [GitHub CDN Technical](github_cdn/github_cdn.md) | GitHub repos as free CDN with jsDelivr integration.

### Free Email
- [Free Email Guide](FreeEmail/FreeEmail_guide.md) | 8 free transactional email services compared: Resend, Brevo, Mailgun, MailerSend, Amazon SES, Mailtrap, SendGrid, Postmark.

### OpenSource Firebase
- [Supabase Complete Guide](OpenSource_Firebase/SuperBase_guide.md) | Open-source Firebase alternative: PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, Realtime, Edge Functions, Vercel integration.

## Cloud Cost Reduction

### AWS
- [AWS Cost Reduction for CEO](AWS/Aws%20cost%20reduction%20for%20ceo.md) | Executive-level strategies: reserved instances, savings plans, rightsizing.

## AI / LLM

### LLM (General)
- [Caveman RTK Token Optimization](LLM/Caveman%20rtk%20token%20optimization.md) | Token optimization for LLM interactions: prompt engineering, context management.
- [Quivr Guide](LLM/Quivr_guide.md) | Open-source second brain / knowledge management with LLMs.
- [Open Code Review Guide](LLM/Open%20code%20review%20guide.md) | AI coding CLI tool review: DeepSeek V4 Pro integration, command reference, tool comparison.

### LLM Security
- [Secret Scanning LLM Harness Prompt](LLM_Security/Secret%20scanning%20llm%20harness%20prompt.md) | LLM-based secret scanning prompt harness design.

### Local LLM
- [Ollama Install Guide](Local_LLM/Ollama_Install_Guilde.md) | Install and run local LLMs (Llama, Mistral) with Ollama.

### LLM Token Compression
- [Headroom Complete Guide](Headroom/Headroom%20complete%20guide.md) | AI agent context compression: 60-95% token savings, SmartCrusher/CodeCompressor/CacheAligner engines.

## AI Coding Assistants

### MiniMax Coding Guide
- [README](MiniMax%20Coding%20Guide/README.md) | MiniMax AI coding assistant guide overview.
- [MiniMax Coding Guide (EN)](MiniMax%20Coding%20Guide/minimax-coding-guide.en.md) | VS Code integration, agent workflows, price/performance comparison.
- [MiniMax Coding Guide (KO)](MiniMax%20Coding%20Guide/minimax-coding-guide.ko.md) | Korean version.
- [VS C# LLM Guide (EN)](MiniMax%20Coding%20Guide/visual-studio-csharp-llm-guide.en.md) | C# AI assistants for VS, DeepSeek/multi-LLM setup.
- [VS C# LLM Guide (KO)](MiniMax%20Coding%20Guide/visual-studio-csharp-llm-guide.ko.md) | Korean version.

### AI Coding Workflow
- [AI Coding Workflow Guide](effective_LLM/AI%20coding%20workflow%20claude%20code%20cursor%20chatgpt.md) | Strategies for Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT: tool selection, parallel usage, context management, cost optimization.

## AI Agent & Website Standards

### Agent-Friendly Website Guide
- [Guide (EN)](agent-friendly-website-guide/agent-friendly-website-guide.en.md) | 11-chapter practical guide: semantic HTML, ARIA, Schema.org, llms.txt, WebMCP.
- [Guide (KO)](agent-friendly-website-guide/agent-friendly-website-guide.ko.md) | Korean version.
- [Guide (JA)](agent-friendly-website-guide/agent-friendly-website-guide.ja.md) | Japanese version.
- [llms.txt](agent-friendly-website-guide/llms.txt) | Machine-readable index for AI agents.

## Developer Tools

### Bigfive
- [Bigfive Getting Started](Bigfive/Bigfive%20getting%20started.md) | Web-based Big Five personality assessment framework.
